title: Mom & Me
overview: Mom and Me takes a look at tough guys and the even tougher women who raise them. Set in Oklahoma City, apparently voted the manliest city in the United States, this creative documentary from Irish director Ken Wardrop ("His & Hers") chronicles the relationships between ten sons and their mothers.

trailers.title: MOM & ME: Official Irish Trailer: In cinemas July 15th
